name: Methylation-supportive diet and lifestyle
summary: Methylation-supportive diet and lifestyle is a multi-component program normalized for a pilot DNA-methylation age trial.
mechanism_summary: Combines diet, supplements, lifestyle, and behavior changes intended to influence methylation metabolism and epigenetic-clock biomarkers.

open_questions: Whether the linked evidence generalizes beyond the specific population, model, tissue, or disease context already recorded in the public finding. Linked context: Methylation-supportive diet and lifestyle pilot RCT; Methylation-supportive diet and lifestyle pilot lowered Horvath DNAmAge.
Whether mechanism-specific effects can be separated from combination, product, delivery, or study-design confounding.
Whether future studies can connect the observed biomarker, functional, or model-organism signal to durable aging-relevant outcomes.
